mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID WHERE EA.STAT_CODE = 'A'

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.EVENT_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, IMG.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, CASE WHEN EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE IMG ON PMI.IMG_NO = IMG.IMG_NO WHERE EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY EP.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND EA.STAT_CODE = 'A'

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.EVENT_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, IMG.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, CASE WHEN EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE IMG ON PMI.IMG_NO = IMG.IMG_NO WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY EP.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.EVENT_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, IMG.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, CASE WHEN EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE IMG ON PMI.IMG_NO = IMG.IMG_NO WHERE EP.PROM_ID = #{promoId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROM_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EVENT_PROMOTION ( PROM_ID, EVENT_ID, PROM_TITLE, PROM_DETAIL, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, VIEWS ) VALUES ( #{promoId}, #{eventId}, #{promoTitle}, #{promoDetail}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT_PROMOTION SET PROM_TITLE = #{promoTitle}, PROM_DETAIL = #{promoDetail}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PROM_ID = #{promoId}
